Skip to main content

ELECTRONIC ARTEFACTS

Complex digital systems, made clear.

Electronic Artefacts is an independent creative technology and design studio. We define and build client products, develop proprietary systems, publish open-source tools, and release research-led cultural work. Strategy, interface design, software engineering, knowledge architecture and editorial practice are treated as parts of one coherent system.

View client work Discuss a project
Client products Proprietary systems Open-source tools Research Artistic publishing
Studio channelCurrent systems, research and public work
@electronic.artefacts @creativestuff.jpg

PROPRIETARY TECHNOLOGY

VASTE is the runtime behind the studio’s knowledge systems.

VASTE is a reusable software foundation for products in which identity, context, relationships and permissions must remain coherent as the system grows. Its graph architecture supports durable entities and explicit connections instead of reducing knowledge to isolated pages or folders.

RUNTIME FOUNDATION

A foundation for connected digital products

The program brings together graph systems, contextual execution, modular software and research into a shared technical core. Projects can inherit that core while retaining their own interface, audience and operating model. This reduces duplicated infrastructure and keeps provenance, access rules and system boundaries legible.

Explore VASTE Review the programs

THREE PRACTICES

One studio. Three distinct ways of working.

Each practice answers a different need, but all three share the same concern for clarity, durable structure and evidence. The result may be a product, a reusable system, a publication or a cultural work; the method always connects the visible surface to the architecture beneath it.

CLIENT DELIVERY

Digital products and platforms

Client work combines product definition, UX, interface systems and engineering. Engagements can begin with a new proposition, an existing platform that needs clearer structure, or a compromised and undocumented system that requires careful investigation before reconstruction.

View client work

PROPRIETARY SYSTEMS

Reusable technology foundations

Programs such as VASTE turn repeated architectural questions into maintained software. They support knowledge graphs, identity, contextual execution and modular product development, and can be evaluated through focused pilots, implementation partnerships or licensing discussions.

Explore programs

CULTURE AND RESEARCH

Research and artistic publishing

Research investigates technology, memory, culture and knowledge systems through notes, prototypes and publications. Artistic work gives those questions another form through sound, visual systems and evolving archives, keeping the studio connected to experimentation rather than a single commercial category.

Explore research

PALIMPSESTS / ORETH

Palimpsests: a five-act album cycle and evolving archive.

Palimpsests is a conceptual album by ORETH about memory, inheritance, transformation and the traces that survive. The work moves through origins, remembrance, lived experience, transcendence and heritage. Its public record connects the music to writing, visual material and archive entries so the project can continue to accumulate context over time.

Discover Palimpsests Browse the archive

SELECTED WORK

Products, platforms, open software and cultural systems with their role made explicit.

The project record distinguishes live client delivery, products in development, open-source software, proprietary infrastructure and cultural publishing. That context matters: it shows what was built, why it exists and how each result relates to the larger studio practice.

CLIENT WORK / PRODUCTION

L’Œil de Meg

A photography portfolio and CRM ecosystem combining a public visual identity with the operational structure needed to manage client work. The project demonstrates how brand, UX and software can be designed as a single service.

PLATFORM / DEVELOPMENT

AtypikHouse

A hospitality platform for curated unusual stays, immersive discovery, host listings, traveller profiles and booking flows. Its dossier connects market positioning and art direction to a concrete interface and product architecture.

OPEN SOURCE / LIVE

Voice Capture Studio

A local-first browser recording studio for speech datasets, voice-over and dubbing workflows. It publishes a live demo, source repository and structured WAV plus metadata export model.

KNOWLEDGE INFRASTRUCTURE / DEVELOPMENT

Vestiges

A flagship VASTE platform for mapping, preserving and activating living know-how across people, practices, materials, places and institutions. It treats provenance and durable relationships as core product features.

Browse projects See more work
